title: RHCSA 10 Mock Exam H
description: A RHCSA 10 mock exam focused on RHEL 10 administration, Flatpak, systemd timers, storage, networking, users, security, and services.

tasks: On client, set hostname to clienth.exam10.lab and map serverh.exam10.lab to 192.168.122.3.
Configure System eth1 with IPv4 address 192.168.122.67/24, gateway 192.168.122.1, and DNS 192.168.122.3.
On server, set hostname to serverh.exam10.lab and map clienth.exam10.lab to 192.168.122.4.
On client, create /root/exam-h-report.txt containing REPORT-H and copy it to server:/root/exam-h-report.txt.
On server, create and enable serverhtimer.timer so it appends SERVER-H to /var/log/serverhtimer.log every 10 minutes.
Create group teamh10, create user userh10, set password cinder9, and add the user to teamh10.
Set maximum password age for userh10 to 52 days and warning period to 7 days.
Persistently enable httpd_can_network_connect.
Write users whose shell ends with sh to /root/h-shell-users.txt.
On server, configure persistent systemd journal storage.
On server, create /srv/serverh10 owned by root:serverh10 with mode 2770.
Create a cron job for userh10 that writes EXAM10 to /home/userh10/exam10.log every 15 minutes.
Create VG vgh10 and LV datah mounted at /mnt/datah10.
Set the default target to multi-user.target without rebooting.
On server, route local6 log messages to /var/log/examh-local6.log and write a test message.
Install lsof and ensure tcpdump is removed.
On server, make chronyd available as the lab time source. On client, configure chronyd with server as its only time source.
On server, publish /var/www/html/server-h.html containing RHCSA10-H and serve httpd on TCP port 8207.
On client and server, create enabled BaseOS and AppStream repository definitions with BaseOS at http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and AppStream at http://server/repo/AppStream/; disable GPG checks.
Allow %teamh10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl without a password.
On server, allow members of serverh10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
Create gzip archive /root/h-etc.tar.gz containing /etc/hosts and /etc/fstab.
hints: Make changes persistent unless a question says otherwise.
Use local repositories and local documentation; do not depend on internet access.
Flatpak and systemd timer tasks belong to the RHCSA 10 track.
checks: hostnamectl --static | grep -qx clienth.exam10.lab && grep -Eq '^192\.168\.122\.3[[:space:]]+serverh\.exam10\.lab$' /etc/hosts

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.67/24' && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.1' && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.3' && nmcli -g ipv4.method connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx manual
hostnamectl --static | grep -qx serverh.exam10.lab && grep -Eq '^192\.168\.122\.4[[:space:]]+clienth\.exam10\.lab$' /etc/hosts
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq REPORT-H /root/exam-h-report.txt'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled serverhtimer.timer | grep -qx enabled && grep -Eq '"'"'^OnCalendar=\*:0/10$'"'"' /etc/systemd/system/serverhtimer.timer && grep -Fxq '"'"'echo SERVER-H >> /var/log/serverhtimer.log'"'"' /usr/local/sbin/serverhtimer.sh'
getent group teamh10 >/dev/null && id -nG userh10 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx teamh10
chage -l userh10 | grep -Eq 'Maximum.*52'
getsebool httpd_can_network_connect | grep -Eq -- '--> on$' && semanage boolean -l -C | grep -E '^httpd_can_network_connect\s+\(on\s*,\s*on\)'
test -s /root/h-shell-users.txt && grep -q '^root$' /root/h-shell-users.txt

test -d /var/log/journal && systemctl is-active systemd-journald | grep -qx active && find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf' \) -type f | grep -q . && find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf' \) -type f -exec awk 'FNR == 1 {in_journal=0} /^[[:space:]]*\[Journal\][[:space:]]*($|#)/ {in_journal=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\[/ {in_journal=0} in_journal && /^[[:space:]]*Storage[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*persistent[[:space:]]*($|#)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}' {} +
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group serverh10 >/dev/null && stat -c '"'"'%U:%G:%a'"'"' /srv/serverh10 | grep -qx root:serverh10:2770'
crontab -l -u userh10 2>/dev/null | grep -Fqx '*/15 * * * * echo EXAM10 >> /home/userh10/exam10.log'

lv_path=/dev/vgh10/datah; mapper_path=/dev/mapper/vgh10-datah; mountpoint=/mnt/datah10; lv_uuid="$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$lv_path")"; lvs "$lv_path" >/dev/null 2>&1 && findmnt -no TARGET "$mountpoint" | grep -qx "$mountpoint" && awk -v dev="$lv_path" -v mapper="$mapper_path" -v uuid="$lv_uuid" -v target="$mountpoint" '$1 !~ /^#/ && $2 == target && $3 == "xfs" && ($1 == dev || $1 == mapper || $1 == "UUID=" uuid || $1 == "/dev/disk/by-uuid/" uuid) {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
systemctl get-default | grep -qx multi-user.target
grep -Eq '^local6\.\*[[:space:]]+/var/log/examh-local6\.log$' /etc/rsyslog.d/examh-local6.conf && systemctl is-active rsyslog | grep -qx active && grep -Fq 'exam-h local6' /var/log/examh-local6.log
rpm -q lsof >/dev/null && ! rpm -q tcpdump >/dev/null 2>&1

grep -Eq '^server[[:space:]]+server[[:space:]]+iburst' /etc/chrony.conf && systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq RHCSA10-H /var/www/html/server-h.html && grep -Eq '"'"'^Listen[[:space:]]+8207$'"'"' /etc/httpd/conf.d/exam-h-port.conf && semanage port -l | awk '"'"'$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8207([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8207/tcp && firewall-cmd --query-port=8207/tcp && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active'

awk 'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; awk '"'"'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo'
grep -ERq '^%teamh10[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$' /etc/sudoers.d

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^%serverh10[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$'"'"' /etc/sudoers.d/serverh10-systemctl && visudo -cf /etc/sudoers.d/serverh10-systemctl >/dev/null'
test -f /root/h-etc.tar.gz && tar -tzf /root/h-etc.tar.gz | grep -Eq 'etc/(hosts|fstab)'
solution_outline: Work through each question independently and verify before moving on.

Configure System eth1 with IPv4 address 192.168.122.67/24, gateway 192.1
set hostname to serverh.exam10.lab and map clienth.exam10.lab to 192.168
create /root/exam-h-report.txt containing REPORT-H and copy it to server
create and enable serverhtimer.timer so it appends SERVER-H to /var/log/
Create group teamh10, create user userh10, set password cinder9, and add
Set maximum password age for userh10 to 52 days and warning period to 7
Persistently enable httpd_can_network_connect
Write users whose shell ends with sh to /root/h-shell-users.txt
configure persistent systemd journal storage
create /srv/serverh10 owned by root:serverh10 with mode 2770
Create a cron job for userh10 that writes EXAM10 to /home/userh10/exam10
Create VG vgh10 and LV datah mounted at /mnt/datah10
Set the default target to multi-user.target without rebooting
route local6 log messages to /var/log/examh-local6.log and write a test
Install lsof and ensure tcpdump is removed
make chronyd available as the lab time source. On client, configure chro

On client and server, create enabled BaseOS and AppStream repository def

solution_commands: nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.67/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serverhtimer.service <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Server H timer job

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/serverhtimer.sh
EOF

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serverhtimer.timer <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Run server H timer job

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*:0/10
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
EOF

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF

cat > /etc/chrony.conf <<'EOF'
server server iburst
makestep 1.0 3
EOF
semanage port -a -t http_port_t -p tcp 8207 2>/dev/null || semanage port -m -t http_port_t -p tcp 8207

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF
